description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and caches the node_modules directory. Define a single build stage and a before_script that runs npm install -gd gulp-cli followed by npm install -d to install the Gulp CLI globally and the project’s dev dependencies. Add a compiling job in the build stage that executes the gulp command. Configure the job to publish the out directory as an artifact and include any untracked files.
